caption: A screen recording shows a web browser with multiple open tabs, including one titled "Kumu." The main window displays a complex systems map on a dark background, featuring various circular icons connected by lines. These icons contain images and labels such as "Insights $\rightarrow$ Introduction to Kumu," "Inner Worlds," and "Human Learning." In the upper right corner, a small video call window shows a man wearing a grey baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, a second video window appears over the systems map, showing a group of people in a room, including one person wearing a red shirt. By the end of the clip, the systems map fades into a dark, translucent state, leaving the two video windows and a few remaining bright icons, such as "Inner Worlds" and "Human Learning," visible on the screen.
